restaurant.name: Étoile D'Or
restaurant.description: Experience fine taste like never before. An exquisite culinary journey crafted with passion, precision, and the finest ingredients.

items.name: Truffle Arancini
items.description: Crispy risotto balls infused with black truffle and aged parmesan.

items.name: Wagyu Carpaccio
items.description: Thinly sliced A5 Wagyu beef, caper berries, and white truffle oil.

items.name: Oysters Rockefeller
items.description: Premium oysters baked with a rich spinach and absinthe butter.

items.name: Lobster Thermidor
items.description: Butter-poached lobster tail in a creamy cognac sauce, gratinated with Gruyère.

items.name: Filet Mignon
items.description: Grass-fed beef tenderloin, wild mushrooms, and a rich bordelaise reduction.

items.name: Saffron Risotto
items.description: Creamy Arborio rice with Mediterranean saffron, seared scallops, and mascarpone.

items.name: Gold Leaf Mille-Feuille
items.description: Layers of delicate puff pastry, Madagascar vanilla bean cream, topped with 24k gold leaf.

items.name: Dark Chocolate Dome
items.description: Valrhona chocolate mousse with a glowing raspberry center and mirror glaze.

testimonials.name: Eleanor Vance
testimonials.review: A truly unforgettable evening. The service was impeccable and the Wagyu carpaccio simply melted in the mouth.

testimonials.name: Arthur Pendelton
testimonials.review: The epitome of fine dining. Every dish is a work of art, both visually and fundamentally.

testimonials.name: Sophia Laurent
testimonials.review: An exceptional atmosphere with flavors that tantalize the palate. The Gold Leaf Mille-Feuille was phenomenal.
